Business.title: Business partnerships
Business.introAfter: . Please route inquiries to the right contact below.

LegalTerms.title: Terms of use
LegalTerms.p1: These terms govern your use of FilmBox. By browsing or using the service, you agree to them.
LegalTerms.p2: Content, availability, and features may change without notice to keep the best experience for our users.
LegalTerms.p3: You agree not to misuse the service (including attempting unauthorized access, scraping in ways that harm performance, or violating applicable law).
LegalTerms.p4: Intellectual property: branding and UI patterns shown here are illustrative. Third-party names may appear for comparison only.
LegalTerms.p5: Disclaimer: the service is provided “as is” without warranties to the extent permitted by law.
LegalTerms.p6: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means you accept the revised version.

LegalPrivacy.title: Privacy policy
LegalPrivacy.p1: This policy explains what data FilmBox may process and why.
LegalPrivacy.p2: When you browse pages, typical web logs (such as IP address, user agent, and timestamps) may be stored by hosting infrastructure for security and debugging.
LegalPrivacy.p3: If you contact us by email, we process your message content and address to respond.
LegalPrivacy.p4: Admin sign-in uses a session cookie (HTTP-only) to keep you signed in; it is not readable by page scripts.
LegalPrivacy.p5: We do not sell your personal data.
LegalPrivacy.p6: Depending on your region, you may have rights to access, correct, or delete personal data. Contact the DPO route for requests.
LegalPrivacy.p7: This policy may be updated. The latest version is always available on this page.

LegalCookies.title: Cookie policy
LegalCookies.p1: This site may use cookies and similar technologies only as needed for basic operation.
LegalCookies.p2: Session cookies: if you use admin features, an HTTP-only cookie stores your signed session token.
LegalCookies.p3: Preference cookies: theme (light/dark) may be stored locally in the browser for usability.
LegalCookies.p4: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Blocking essential cookies may break sign-in.
LegalCookies.p5: If you add marketing or analytics cookies later, list them here and obtain consent where required.

LegalDpo.title: Data protection officer (DPO)
LegalDpo.p1: For privacy-related questions or requests (including access or deletion where applicable), contact the address below.
LegalDpo.p2suffix: is the designated data protection contact for FilmBox.
LegalDpo.p3: Please include enough detail for us to verify and fulfill your request. Response times depend on complexity and applicable law.
LegalDpo.p4: If you have not received a response within 15 business days, please follow up via the support page.

Support.title: Customer support
Support.p1: If you need help with your account, VIP subscription, or playback, reach out via the channels below.
Support.p2prefix: For feedback and support requests, email

Account.title: My account
Account.guestIntro: Sign in to save favorites, upgrade to VIP, and keep watching across devices.

Careers.title: Careers
Careers.p1: FilmBox is always looking for collaborators who love film and technology. Get in touch to start the conversation.
Careers.p3: Please mention the role you are interested in and include a portfolio link if available.

Community.title: Community
Community.intro: Follow FilmBox on social networks for new titles and promotions.

Admin.title: Movie admin
Admin.loginHint: Default account: admin@example.com / changeme (change in .env and re-seed).
Admin.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
Admin.imageUrlSupportedHint: Paste any public image URL (Drive, TMDB, Unsplash, your own CDN...). Drive share links are converted to direct URLs automatically.
Admin.kindHint: Single film uses one playback source. Series lets you set per-episode link and thumbnail below.
Admin.episodesEditorHint: Visible only when Movie kind = Series. Rows automatically follow the Episodes count above.
Admin.accessSeriesHint: For series, pick free or paid per episode in the list below.
Admin.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete "{title}"? This cannot be undone.

UserAuth.loginHint: Use the email and password you registered with.
UserAuth.registerHint: Takes just a few seconds to create your FilmBox account.
UserAuth.passwordHint: At least 10 characters, mixing letters and digits.
UserAuth.errMissing: Please fill both email and password.
UserAuth.errShort: Password must be at least 10 characters.
UserAuth.errWeak: Password must include both letters and digits.
UserAuth.errExists: An account with this email already exists.
UserAuth.errRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
UserAuth.errNotUser: This is not a viewer account. Please use the admin sign-in.

payment.copyFailed: Copy failed, please select the value manually.
payment.step1: Open your banking app and scan the QR code (or transfer manually using the details below).
payment.step2: Keep the auto-generated transfer memo unchanged — it lets our team reconcile your order.
payment.step3: VIP is activated within 24 hours of a successful transfer.
payment.activationNote: If VIP is not active after 24 hours, send a receipt screenshot via the support page with your account email.
payment.fallbackBody: Payment is temporarily unavailable. Please contact an administrator for manual VIP activation.
